title: rubus × semipyramidalis
intro: Rubus × semipyramidalis, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the primocane-fruiting raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the autumn-fruiting raspberry (Rubus fruticosus). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus × semipyramidalis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Rubus × semipyramidalis is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, with the tea being a popular herbal remedy for digestive issues and stress relief.
